summary: Large Castle stage decompilation PR centered on src/melee/gr/grcastle.c. It replaced many placeholder functions with C, expanded Castle-specific Ground gv overlays and parameter/table structs, tightened grcastle.h prototypes, and adjusted lb_800103B8 to return float for new wind/vector code. decomp.dev reported +6764 matched bytes, +0.17% overall matched code, 16 new matches, and 9 improved unmatched items. Human discussion only called out an inline rlwimi/rwlimi asm block, which maintainers accepted because it was guarded by MWERKS_GEKKO.

key_files.role: Main implementation; +1447/-55 lines, replacing many /// # placeholders and adding Castle parameters, rodata tables, state machines, camera/material logic, dynamics setup, and vector/wind behavior.
Added Castle-specific Ground gv overlay structs grCastle_GroundVars4 through grCastle_GroundVars12 plus grCastle_Platform.
Changed several prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures for newly decompiled functions.
Changed lb_800103B8 implementation signature from void to float.
Updated lb_800103B8 declaration to float lb_800103B8(Vec3*, Vec3*).

what_changed: Implemented many grCastle functions, with decomp.dev listing full new matches for grCastle_801CEACC, grCastle_801CE578, grCastle_801D0D84, grCastle_801D02B8, grCastle_801CDA0C, grCastle_801CF0F4, grCastle_801CEF04, grCastle_801D0BBC, grCastle_801CE054, grCastle_801CE260, grCastle_801CE8E8, grCastle_801D09B8, grCastle_801CE9E8, grCastle_801CE19C, grCastle_801D0B0C, and grCastle_801CD8A8.

Improved but did not fully match several large functions according to the bot: grCastle_801CFBD4, grCastle_801CF308, grCastle_801CDC44, grCastle_801CF868, grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CE3AC, plus .rodata/.sdata2/.sdata.
Expanded grCastleParams from a mostly opaque blob into offset-annotated fields, a grCastleParams_Entry entries[9] array, x12C[4], and multiple float/counter fields used by stage behavior.

Added local Castle table structs and constants: identity Quaternion grCs_803B7EB8, blink table grCs_803B7EC8, dynamics entries grCs_803B7EA8, y offsets grCs_803B7F50, weight table grCs_803B7EF0, target table grCs_803B7EFC, and static angle step grCs_804D45E0.
Added typed Ground gv overlays for multiple Castle object roles, including platform state, dynamics arrays, timers, bitfields, camera/material handles, target slots, and jobj/effect arrays.
Replaced several raw gp offset writes with typed gv fields, such as gp->gv.castle9.xDE, xD4/xD6/xD8/xDA/xDC, dynamics[i], gp->gv.castle8.plat[idx].wind, and gp->gv.castle3.x1C[i].data.

Added archive-driven dynamics setup in grCastle_801CD658 using grDatFiles_801C6324, HSD_ArchiveGetPublicAddress, dynamicsdata_flag3, dynamicsdata_flag4, dynamicsdata_flag6, Ground_801C3FA4, and grLib_801C9B20.

Added platform/wind movement logic around grCastle_801CDA0C, grCastle_801CDC44, and grCastle_801CF750, including platform jobjs, state/timer fields, wind accumulation, speed caps, and HSD_JObjSetTranslateY.

Added camera and material object lifecycle code in functions such as grCastle_801CE260, grCastle_801CE578, grCastle_801CE8E8, and grCastle_801CE9E8 using Camera_80029044/Camera_800290D4, grMaterial_801C8CFC, grMaterial_801C8CDC, and it_80275414.
Added obstacle/effect toggling logic around grCastle_801CEACC, grCastle_801CEF04, grCastle_801CFBD4, grCastle_801D0298, and grCastle_801D02B8, including per-map cases for PURA, SHRINE, and GARDEN.

Added wind/vector behavior in grCastle_801D09B8, grCastle_801D0BBC, and grCastle_801D0D84 using ftLib position/velocity helpers, lb_800103B8, lbVector_Normalize, lbVector_Angle, PSVECCrossProduct, atan2f, cosf, and sinf.
smart_moves: The PR first made the Castle data model more explicit: expanding grCastleParams and adding many grCastle_GroundVars overlays let later functions use stable typed accesses instead of fragile raw byte offsets.

Small rodata tables were wrapped in local structs and copied to stack locals, such as grCastle_DynEntries entries_s, grCastle_BlinkTable tbl, grCastle_YOffsets offsets, grCastle_WeightTable weights, and grCastle_TargetTable targets. This is a reusable tactic when array-copy codegen matters.
The inline rlwimi bit manipulation was isolated behind #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO with NOT_IMPLEMENTED outside that compiler path, limiting portability fallout while preserving the matching sequence.

Matching-only structure was kept local and obvious: #pragma dont_inline around grCastle_801CDF54, a grCastle_801CE3AC_dontinline trampoline, PAD_STACK calls, dummy stack allocation, UNUSED locals, and a fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate inline all signal codegen-shaping rather than semantic API design.

The fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate reproduces HSD_JObjSetTranslate side effects with jobj.h-style HSD_ASSERT file context and ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation, a concrete example of inlining a library helper when the real call shape does not match.
Header prototypes were updated alongside implementation work, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS usage and making cross-file call sites more informative.
decomp_lessons: For stage modules, typing the Ground gv union is often the unlock: named overlays with offset comments can convert pointer arithmetic into readable code and expose state machines, timers, handles, and arrays.

Do not over-name unknown fields too early. This PR keeps xC4/xD8/pad_xNN names for uncertain fields while naming clear roles such as jobj, pos, state, timer, wind, map_id, jobj_idx, entries, and dynamics.
When rodata arrays are copied to stack before use, model them as small struct wrappers rather than loose arrays if that is what the compiler wants.
Bitfield writes can require targeted inline assembly for exact rlwimi output; if used, guard it by compiler and keep the surrounding typed field access clear.

Matching can require helper prototypes that reflect ABI/codegen behavior, not just obvious C semantics. The lb_800103B8 change to float is used by grCastle_801D0D84, but the diff body still has no explicit return, so future cleanup should verify the intended ABI behavior before generalizing.
Reviewable matching hacks should be isolated and easy to search, especially fake inlines, dont_inline trampolines, PAD_STACK, and guarded asm.
naming_conventions: Castle static data uses the grCs_ prefix, e.g. grCs_803B7EFC, grCs_803B7F50, grCs_804D6970, and grCs_804D45E0.

Stage-local helper types use grCastle_ prefixes with descriptive suffixes, e.g. grCastleParams_Entry, grCastle_DynEntry, grCastle_DynEntries, grCastle_YOffsets, grCastle_WeightTable, grCastle_TargetEntry, and grCastle_TargetTable.
Ground gv overlays are numbered by discovered Castle object role: grCastle_GroundVars4 through grCastle_GroundVars12 were added rather than forcing one monolithic struct.
Offset comments are preserved in structs, including both local offsets and gp-relative offsets in gr/types.h.
Unknown fields remain xNN/pad_xNN until semantics are strong; clearer fields use role names such as plat, jobj, pos, timer, wind, effect_a, effect_b, baseY, map_id, and jobj_idx.
grcastle.h continues the project convention of address comments before prototypes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inline asm uses rlwimi byte, one, 7, 24, 24 and rlwimi byte, zero, 7, 24, 24 to set/clear bit 7 of gp->gv.castle9.xDE under #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO.
#pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop was added around grCastle_801CDF54.
A grCastle_801CE3AC_dontinline wrapper calls grCastle_801CE3AC to force call/inlining shape.
fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate inlines HSD_ASSERT line numbers 916/917 with __FILE__ forced to jobj.h and then assigns jobj->translate plus ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation.
PAD_STACK and dummy local stack blocks are used in multiple functions to shape stack layout.
Several constants are materialized through local struct copies from static const tables rather than direct global indexing.
The diff includes a comment on grCastle_801D09B8: Weird parameter stuff, but it matches?
MSL trigf and MetroTRK intrinsics headers were added to support matching math and intrinsic usage.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed matched code 61.02%, +0.17%, +6764 bytes, with 16 new matches and 9 improvements in unmatched items.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Pointed out that there was inline asm for an rwlimi/rlwimi call in one function and that they could not comment directly on it.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Responded that the inline asm was seen but surrounded by #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO, so they were not worried about it at the time.
No inline review comments or formal reviews were present in the slice; PR body only said Draft PR as usual.

follow_up_queries: Search later PRs touching grCastle_GroundVars10 or grCastle_GroundVars11 to see whether xNN fields received semantic names.
Search for rlwimi or rwlimi in grcastle to see whether the guarded inline asm was later removed or replaced with portable C.
Check later history of lb_800103B8 to confirm whether the float return type and no-explicit-return body were retained, documented, or corrected.

Find later PRs for remaining high-percent unmatched functions from this bot report: grCastle_801CFBD4, grCastle_801CF308, grCastle_801CDC44, grCastle_801CF868, grCastle_801CD658, and grCastle_801CE3AC.
Search for fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslate or __FILE__ jobj.h to reuse or retire that inline-assert matching pattern.
Search for grCastleParams x10/x14/x18/x38/x3C/x48/x4C/x50/x110 semantic renames in future stage work.
